calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-22-2008 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-10-2008 Continued To Aug-01-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jun-19-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this morning for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Carl Sauceda, CSR #2031.

Elizabeth McDonald, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau, Inc.
Justin Payton, witness for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Systems and Apliled Solutions Corporation.
Default entered against defendant on March 12, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed on March 12, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau, Inc., and against the Defaulted Defendant Systems and Applied Solutions Corporation as follows:

Damages/Principal - $41,093.01.
Prejudgment Interest - $2,915.91.
Attorney's Fees - $2,300.00.
Costs - $363.00, for a total of $46,671.92.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar May-29-2008 Continued To Jun-19-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
